hypothesis_tested: defect is MECHANICAL in step() generate path (a-d)

verdict.evidence: Shared KV snapshot A/B (manual_leg1 vs _attempt body) produced BYTE-IDENTICAL token streams and BOTH hit Vortex-3-Sierra. clear_injection after prompt is a no-op when inject already None. Stop-sequence early-exit only fires after <|return|> is already chosen.
verdict.real_defect_detail: Arena live_shift = n_sink + arena_width opens a RoPE hole. GPT-OSS free generation collapses into word-salad/special-token text when live_shift is large (session default arena_width=384 → live_shift≈387). Pure model (position_offset continuous from 0) and arena with forced live_shift∈{0,n_sink} produce clean English on the same prompt bytes. Leg-1 HIT used width=96 (live_shift=115) + feed()-planted facts, not session width=384 + step() plants.

shared_state_A_vs_B.A_text: I will respond with "Vortex-3-Sierra" as the stored value
shared_state_A_vs_B.B_text: I will respond with "Vortex-3-Sierra" as the stored value
shared_state_A_vs_B.C_leg1_prefix_text: The current cypher bridge value is Vortex-3-Sierra.<|return|>.

independent_rebuild_false_positive.note: First run rebuilt state twice; step1 top-2 was a near-tie (' will' logit=15.5625 vs '’ll' 15.5625). Rebuild FP noise flipped greedy choice — NOT a loop-body delta. Shared snapshot eliminated it.

live_shift_width_sweep.law: live_shift ≲ ~20–115: English (matches pure refusal or benign chat). live_shift ≈ 387–403: catastrophic salad (session smoke signature).

b_resume_refeed_misalignment.note: Probes resumed:true refeed garbage transcripts deposited by (a)-broken plants.

c_stop_sequence_token_slicing.note: Stops only truncate after <|return|> already decoded; shared A/B identical without needing stop delta.

d_sampling_greedy_config.note: Both paths greedy argmax; shared state identical. Knife-edge ties exist but are not the salad class.

e_new_session_plant_via_generate.note: Leg-1 feed()s complete turns (no generate). Session step()-generates every plant under live_shift=387 → deposits salad into grafts/live window → later probes read poison.

minimal_fix_statement.primary: scripts/grm_e2e_session.py: load_model_and_repo / argparse --arena-width default 384 → drop to Leg-1-proven 96 (or measure max safe live_shift for GPT-OSS YARN). Also set sink_text to Harmony SYS (not default '<conversation>\n') so n_sink/live_shift match the proven Leg-1 seating.
file_lines: core/graft_arena.py:77 (live_shift = n_sink + arena_width  — product law; dialect may need GPT-OSS bound)
minimal_fix_statement.secondary_driver: Plant facts via feed(complete harmony turn) like Leg-1, or accept that free-gen plants under a large live_shift hole will poison deposits. Product fix for hole tolerance is deeper than a driver default.
minimal_fix_statement.not_the_fix: Changing step() stop-sequence loop or prompt_template alone (already byte-correct).
